auth.label: API Key
auth.description: IP2Proxy Web Service API key passed with the key query parameter. Existing customers can sign in through the IP2Location client area to view it: https://www.ip2location.com/client-area. The official product page documents the current signup status: https://www.ip2location.com/web-service/ip2proxy

actions.name: lookup_ip
actions.description: Detect whether one IPv4 or IPv6 address is a proxy and return the official IP2Proxy lookup payload.

anyOf.description: The IPv4 address to look up.
The IPv6 address to look up.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

package.description: The IP2Proxy package code to query. The official API defaults to PX1 when omitted.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one proxy detection lookup.

response.description: The response status string returned by IP2Proxy.

domain.description: The internet domain associated with the IP range.

usageType.description: The usage type classification returned by IP2Proxy.

lastSeen.description: How many days ago the proxy was last seen.

proxyType.description: The proxy type returned by IP2Proxy.

isProxy.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a proxy.

threat.description: The security threat classification returned by IP2Proxy.

provider.description: The VPN provider name when IP2Proxy has one.

creditsConsumed.description: The credit count consumed by the query.

outputSchema.description: The proxy detection payload returned by IP2Proxy.
